primarySetting: The whole story takes place in ONE cozy child's bedroom at night: the child's bed, a warm small bedside lamp, a collapsed pillow-cave fort by the bed, and the child's blanket. It is the SAME night bedroom on every page — never a clinic, never daylight, never another room, never outdoors.
forbiddenDrift: more than one Leo / duplicate or cloned lion
a magically rebuilt standing pillow fort (it stays collapsed/scattered)
redesigning the bedroom set between pages
transitionRules: Stay in the SAME night bedroom on every page — camera may move, the room must not redesign.
Never cut to a clinic, a daytime room, another room, or outdoors.
The pillow-cave stays collapsed/scattered (never magically rebuilt); the thunder-corner blanket fold appears once the child makes it.

scenes.label: The night bedroom
scenes.description: One cozy child's bedroom at night — the child's bed, a warm small bedside lamp, a collapsed pillow-cave fort by the bed, the child's blanket. The single set for the whole book.

recurringObjects.label: the child's bed
recurringObjects.identity: The SAME child's bed every page with the same warm small bedside lamp beside it and the same blanket. A child's bed, never a crib or hospital bed.

stateTimeline.state: the child sits on the bed beside the fallen pillow-cave, holding the blanket tightly, the bedside lamp lit
the child lies down calm and sleepy in the same bed as the lamp dims softly

recurringObjects.label: the pillow-cave fort
recurringObjects.identity: The SAME pile of bed pillows the child built into a small cave/fort by the bed. After it falls it stays a collapsed, scattered heap — NEVER a rebuilt standing fort or tent.
forbiddenDrift: a standing or rebuilt pillow fort/tent/canopy

stateTimeline.state: just collapsed — the top pillow has fallen, the little cave is down
scattered across the floor near the bed, pillows lying as if tired
still gently scattered, NOT magically rebuilt

recurringObjects.label: the thunder corner
recurringObjects.identity: A small fold in the blanket beside the pillow that the child chooses as the 'thunder corner' — a small place to put the anger. The same small blanket fold once it is made.
forbiddenDrift: a separate prop or toy (it is only a fold in the blanket)

stateTimeline.state: the child finds and chooses a small fold in the blanket beside the pillow as the thunder corner; Leo's two paws and the child's hand rest on it
the thunder corner is used — a small soft warm ripple-like glow rests in the blanket fold (no text or symbols)
the blanket-fold thunder corner remains by the pillow

forbiddenDrift: any clinic, hospital, or medical setting
daylight or a bright daytime room
any room other than this one night bedroom
more than one lion or child
